org.bitstorm.gameoflife
Class StandAloneGameOfLifeGrid

java.lang.Object
  org.bitstorm.gameoflife.GameOfLifeGrid
      org.bitstorm.gameoflife.StandAloneGameOfLifeGrid
All Implemented Interfaces:
CellGrid
class StandAloneGameOfLifeGrid
extends GameOfLifeGrid

Extends GameOfLifeGrid with file open and save operations.
